message:
fix: Resolve numpy variant link errors (missing symbols, SIMD dispatch, C++ exceptions)

- Add temp_elide.c and blas_utils.c to compile lists (fixes undefined
  npy_blas_supports_fpe, try_binary_elide, can_elide_temp_unary)
- Change NPY_CPU_DISPATCH_CALL_XB to no-op so SIMD sort dispatch
  pointers stay nullptr and scalar fallback runs (fixes QSort/QSelect)
- Add scalar ufunc loop implementations for boolean and trig ops that
  the skipped C++ SIMD dispatch files would normally provide
- Add -fno-exceptions to all C++ compilations (fixes __cxa_allocate_exception)
- Add -I$BUILD_DIR/gen to RANDOM_CFLAGS, CYTHON_RANDOM_CFLAGS, and
  FFT_CFLAGS (fixes __multiarray_api.h not found)
